mechanism: Current suppressed FX vol places markets in the low-vol regime where rate differentials explain 8-12% of FX variance. When FX vol rises, rate-FX explanatory power collapses to 0-2%. The vol level determines which regime the relationship operates in.
regime_dependence: Strongest in low-vol regimes (FX implied vol <25th percentile); breaks down when FX vol spikes above transition threshold

mechanism: Credit cycle position determines whether a carry unwind progresses to Phase 4 (credit widening). Only 2/7 episodes with concurrent credit deterioration reached the full 4-phase sequence; others arrested at Phase 1-2 as contained positioning-driven events.
regime_dependence: Phase 4 only activates when credit cycle has already turned. At current IG ~110bp and HY ~380bp (below danger thresholds), base case is containment at Phase 1-2.

mechanism: Compressed spring posterior probability of 35-50% for a 20%+ move determines whether FX gamma is positive expected value. Break-even is ~29%; the posterior places gamma firmly above break-even. If probability falls below ~29% (lower tail of CI), the trade breaks down.
regime_dependence: Trade viable while compressed spring probability exceeds ~29% break-even; not robust at the very lower end of the 21-61% credible interval

mechanism: Suppressed FX implied vol makes options cheap (straddle ~4.5-5.5% of notional at 10% IV), improving gamma risk-reward. The current ~1.8 sigma divergence from the MOVE-FX vol regression suggests systematic underpricing of FX tail risk.
regime_dependence: Holds while FX vol remains at ~25th percentile relative to rates vol at ~65th percentile post-GFC

mechanism: USD invoicing dominance creates the transmission channel through which DM rate divergence (strengthening USD) directly amplifies EM food costs, activating the depreciation → food inflation → policy error → further depreciation vicious loop. Operates before trade or capital flow mechanisms.
regime_dependence: Strongest when USD strengthening coincides with elevated commodity prices; partially mitigated by domestic agricultural self-sufficiency

mechanism: Dollar funding corridor connects Treasury basis trades and FX carry, creating 24-72 hour propagation: basis unwind → UST illiquidity → repo spike → CIP basis widening → dollar squeeze → forced carry unwind. Either market can initiate the sequence.
regime_dependence: Only activates for large funding shocks; small shocks absorbed without cascade. Standing repo facility effectiveness untested under genuine stress.

mechanism: BoJ rate normalization is the highest-probability individual trigger for compressed spring release. Each normalization step compounds dislocation probability, with selection bias concentrating remaining carry positions in more leveraged hands, raising severity conditional on trigger.
regime_dependence: Follows foreshock → main event pattern with 13-14 month historical gap; current 19-month gap introduces genuine uncertainty about pattern validity

mechanism: Structural breaks reduce the appropriate percentile reading of current rate divergence from 85th-97th (full sample) to 60th-75th (post-2008 reference), weakening the compressed spring signal from 'extreme' to 'moderate' and directly lowering the probability estimate.
regime_dependence: Impact depends on which structural regime (pre-1985, 1985-2008, post-2008) is appropriate reference; resolvable via Bai-Perron test

mechanism: During stress, carry-momentum correlation jumps to +0.5/+0.9, collapsing diversification. This is the behavioral manifestation of carry's latent dollar + credit beta: when common factors sell off, both carry and momentum load on them simultaneously, revealing hidden factor concentration.
regime_dependence: Normal regime: correlation -0.2/-0.3, factors appear diversified. Stress regime: +0.5/+0.9, hidden common exposure revealed.

mechanism: Export ban cascades amplify the original food price shock by 30-60% through prisoner's dilemma dynamics, intensifying the depreciation-inflation-policy error loop in food-importing EM economies. 33 countries restricted in 2007-08; the amplification is endogenous to the initial price shock.
regime_dependence: Activates when USD strength >10% coincides with wheat >$8/bu; conditional probability >60% historically (n=3)

mechanism: Self-referential citing inflates positive claim count without expanding evidence, while negative evidence (rejections) requires only logic and math and cannot be inflated. The asymmetry produces a program where genuine robust findings are predominantly negative.
regime_dependence: Worsens with each iteration that does not add new data or score time-bound predictions

mechanism: Options are cheapest precisely in the 8.5-10.5% vol-of-vol transition zone when regime uncertainty is highest. This hedging paradox means pre-positioned gamma strategies have the best entry when current conditions (low FX vol, high regime uncertainty) prevail.
regime_dependence: Holds specifically in the 8.5-10.5% realized FX vol transition zone; above threshold options are expensive, below threshold regime uncertainty is lower

mechanism: FX adjusts faster than central bank committee cycles (structural). BoJ normalization creates rate divergence requiring resolution, and the historical pattern shows FX moves first by 2-6 months before rates converge, implying FX markets will anticipate and front-run BoJ normalization effects.
regime_dependence: Applies to extreme divergence episodes (>85th percentile rate divergence)

mechanism: Maturity-dependent correlation bifurcation means front-end negative UST-SPX correlation gives false hedging assurance while long-end positive correlation compounds losses. Carry portfolios hedged with short-end rates appear diversified but are exposed to correlated losses at the long end during positioning unwinds.
regime_dependence: Novel regime with only one historical precedent (late 2005-2006); absent in 2022 (unified inflation) and 2017-2019 (standard disinflation)

mechanism: Political and operational constraints on swap line deployment determine whether the dual fragility corridor can be broken by official intervention. Speed constraints (overnight tenors) may be too slow for the 24-72 hour propagation timeline of funding contagion.
regime_dependence: Constraint binding depends on political environment and required intervention scale; untested at $1.2-3.0T

mechanism: The asymmetric treatment of August 2024 (confirming 6+ models, updating zero downward despite rapid recovery) is a specific high-profile instance of the broader self-referential validation problem where each iteration builds confidence without expanding the evidence base.
regime_dependence: Present throughout the research program; intensifies with each iteration citing prior iterations as established

mechanism: Credit cycle position is a key input to the joint vulnerability copula. Current spreads below danger thresholds favor containment, but the 2025-2027 maturity wall creates non-trivial probability of credit deterioration shifting the copula configuration toward the severe-unwind regime.
regime_dependence: Threshold-dependent: IG >130bp / HY >450bp shift configuration toward 2-4x severity multiplier

mechanism: Structural EUR headwind from TTF-Henry Hub differential feeds into the terms-of-trade component. As energy costs ease, EUR concordance index shifts toward bullish alignment; the hysteresis effect (factories don't return) creates a persistent negative baseline partially offset by energy price moderation.
regime_dependence: Persistent as long as TTF-Henry Hub differential remains elevated and manufacturing relocation hysteresis holds
